hero.title: Where the Wild
hero.description: Embark on extraordinary safari adventures through Tanzania's most breathtaking landscapes — from the endless Serengeti plains to the summit of Kilimanjaro.

campsLodges.title: Where Luxury Meets
campsLodges.description: We have carefully curated a collection of Tanzania's finest camps and lodges — each one selected for quality, location, service, and sustainability. These are not just places to stay; they are integral parts of your safari experience, offering front-row seats to nature's greatest spectacles while enveloping you in comfort and warmth.
campsLodges.readyDesc: Let our team match you with the perfect lodge for your safari. We know each property personally and will recommend the ideal fit for your style, budget, and dream itinerary.

flights.title: Fly to the
flights.description: Tanzania is vast — and the best way to reach its most spectacular corners is by air. We partner with Tanzania's most trusted domestic airlines to ensure your journey between safari destinations is as smooth, safe, and scenic as the adventure itself.
flights.ctaDesc: All domestic flights are included in our safari packages. We handle every booking, transfer, and schedule so you can focus on the adventure ahead.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Start planning your dream safari — we'd love to hear from you
contact.contactDesc: Whether you have a question, need advice, or are ready to book your dream safari, our team is here to help.
contact.formDesc: Fill in the details and we'll craft a personalized itinerary for you
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your dream safari...
contact.thankYouDesc: Your inquiry has been received. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
